[D1] (10:10-10:27) TS377037: Using Schema.decodeSync inside an Effect generator is not recommended. Use Schema.decodeEffect instead to get properly typed error channel. effect(schemaSyncInEffect)

  Fix 1: "Disable schemaSyncInEffect for entire file"
